_comments: Binds JSONType metadata to AIBridgeProvider.SupportedFeatures so CodeGen emits a typed
accessor conforming to IBridgeProviderFeatures. Apply AFTER the v5.42 Realtime_Bridges
migration + CodeGen have created the 'MJ: AI Bridge Providers' entity and its fields.
If CodeGen names the entity differently, update the @lookup names below to match.
SupportedFeatures field — strongly-typed platform capability flags

primaryKey.ID: @lookup:MJ: Entity Fields.EntityID=@lookup:MJ: Entities.Name=MJ: AI Bridge Providers&Name=SupportedFeatures
